violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as salmon) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as brown rice) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as brown rice during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (imitation crab) was observed thawing with the package intact at time of inspection. ROP seafood must be completely removed from the package when thawing. Imitation crab was observed held at 28-35 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The person removed the imitation crab from the package during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
